strategy.name: Gold Intraday Bias & Pullback
sources: Trend structure — EMA20 vs EMA50 for directional bias
Momentum confirmation — RSI and MACD histogram alignment
DMI strength check — prefer ADX with DI+ / DI- confirmation

indicators.rsi_14: Momentum filter. Prefer longs above 50 and shorts below 50; avoid chasing above 72 or below 28.
indicators.ema_20_50: Trend filter. Bullish when EMA20 > EMA50, bearish when EMA20 < EMA50.
indicators.macd_histogram: Momentum follow-through. Positive for longs, negative for shorts.
indicators.adx_di: Trend strength and direction. Prefer ADX > 18 with DI+ > DI- for longs and DI- > DI+ for shorts.

neutral: EMA20 and EMA50 are flat or crossing repeatedly
RSI is in extreme zones above 72 or below 28

long: Bias is bullish on 5m and not contradicted by 1h
Price pulls back toward EMA20 and holds above nearby support
RSI remains above 50 and MACD histogram stays >= 0
Enter buy only when spread/volatility is acceptable
short: Bias is bearish on 5m and not contradicted by 1h
Price retraces toward EMA20 and rejects near resistance
RSI remains below 50 and MACD histogram stays <= 0
Enter sell only when spread/volatility is acceptable

exit_rules: Take partials at first target and reduce risk after TP1
Move stop toward breakeven once trade confirms
Exit early if momentum flips against position (MACD/DMI reversal)
risk_rules: Risk 0.25% to 1.00% equity per trade based on mode
Avoid entries during high-impact news windows
Do not open new positions when ADX is weak and structure is unclear
Limit concurrent Gold positions by session risk cap
Require defined invalidation level before entry
notes: Gold-focused intraday rules for XAUUSD. Use 5m execution with 1h context, prioritize trend alignment (EMA/MACD/DMI), and avoid low-quality chop or high-impact event risk.
